title: If app cannot read an item/column, return the cause and ids in the extensions object
excerpt: It would be helpful that itemIds or columnIds that an app cannot query (due to some permissions reason) were returned in the extensions object of the query response with a description of what permissions are causing the …

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be helpful that itemIds or columnIds that an app cannot query (due to some permissions reason) were returned in the extensions object of the query response with a description of what permissions are causing the denial of access.

Being able to see what permission is affecting the ability of a recipe to function helps troubleshoot the issue with customers.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @anon29275264,

I have created a request for this!

Thank you for the feedback!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Request: monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done
